name: @opencode-ai/clangd-mcp
description: Standalone MCP server bridging clangd LSP to OpenCode agents

scripts.build: /usr2/adagur/.bun/bin/bun build ./src/index.ts --outfile ./dist/index.js --target node --format esm --external neo4j-driver && /usr2/adagur/.bun/bin/bun build ./src/bridge/index.ts --outfile ./dist/bridge.js --target node --format esm
scripts.validate:01880: env WLAN_WORKSPACE_ROOT=/local/mnt/workspace/code1/WLAN.CNG.1.0-01880.3-QCACNGSWPL_V1_V2_SILICON-1 CLANGD_TCP_BRIDGE_PORT=35101 CHAIN_TEST_TIMEOUT_01880_MS=60000 CHAIN_RETRY_TIMEOUT_01880=1 CHAIN_RESOLVE_TIMEOUT_MS=20000 npx vitest run test/integration/chain-resolver-ground-truth.test.ts
scripts.validate:matrix:conditional-go: npm run validate:unit && npm run typecheck && npm run validate:01880
scripts.validate:graph: npm run build && npm run typecheck && env WLAN_WORKSPACE_ROOT=/local/mnt/workspace/code1/WLAN.CNG.1.0-01880.3-QCACNGSWPL_V1_V2_SILICON-1/wlan_proc npm run test:unit && echo '✓ graph validation: build + unit checks passed'
scripts.validate:graph:neo4j: env NEO4J_URL=bolt://localhost:7687 INTELLIGENCE_NEO4J_USER=neo4j INTELLIGENCE_NEO4J_PASSWORD=neo4jpass npx vitest run test/integration/neo4j-backend.test.ts
scripts.validate:graph:neo4j:seed: env NEO4J_URL=bolt://localhost:7687 INTELLIGENCE_NEO4J_URL=bolt://localhost:7687 INTELLIGENCE_NEO4J_USER=neo4j INTELLIGENCE_NEO4J_PASSWORD=neo4jpass npx vitest run test/integration/neo4j-backend.test.ts
